final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide illustration for a domestic China fundraising roadshow, themed around the "GPT-5.5" launch, with speaker "奥特曼" (Sam Altman), designed to match Chinese GP/LP roadshow tonality.

Style/medium: corporate presentation cover slide, Chinese domestic VC/PE roadshow aesthetic, clean and authoritative
Composition: full-bleed slide layout (16:9), headline centered or upper-center, speaker name and title bottom-left or bottom-right, logo badge top-left
Subject: GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme; speaker credit "演讲人：奥特曼"
Scene/backdrop: abstract tech-forward background — deep navy or dark gradient with subtle circuit/data-flow motifs, conveying AI innovation
Lighting/mood: confident, forward-looking, institutional gravitas; cool-to-warm gradient accent suggesting breakthrough energy
Color palette: deep navy base, gold or electric-blue accent lines, white headline text — consistent with Chinese GP roadshow decks (authority + premium)
Materials/textures: flat vector gradient, subtle geometric mesh or light-ray overlay, no photographic texture
Text (verbatim): "GPT-5.5 发布" as main headline; "演讲人：奥特曼" as speaker credit line
Constraints: layout must read as a Chinese domestic fundraising roadshow PPT cover; all Chinese text must be legible and typographically clean; 16:9 slide proportion
Avoid: Western startup pitch aesthetic, casual or playful fonts, cluttered infographic elements, stock-photo backgrounds, red-heavy political palette
